narrative:
New Albany City has 8,580 registered voters, with 57.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.7%, a clear Republican lean of 9.0 percentage points.
